_comment_01: 这是标准 JSON 配置文件，不能写 // 或 /* */ 注释。This is standard JSON, so do not use // or /* */ comments.
_comment_02: 请修改下面这些根级字段。Edit the root-level fields below this comment block.
_comment_03: _comment_fields 只是字段说明，不会被程序读取。_comment_fields is documentation only and is not read as runtime config.
_comment_04: 路径尽量写绝对路径，尤其是 python_path、marker_cli、input_root、output_root、hf_home。Use absolute paths whenever possible, especially for python_path, marker_cli, input_root, output_root, and hf_home.
_comment_05: macOS 只使用 python_path；pythonw_path 仅供 Windows 后台计划任务优先使用。macOS only uses python_path; pythonw_path is mainly for Windows background scheduled tasks.

_comment_fields.input_root: 源 PDF 根目录；CLI 和 Zotero 插件会用它计算相对路径。Root directory containing source PDFs; the CLI and Zotero plugin use it for relative paths.
_comment_fields.output_root: 输出根目录；程序会在这里写入 markdown、marker_raw、logs、state。Root output directory for markdown, marker_raw, logs, and state.
_comment_fields.python_path: Python 可执行文件绝对路径；macOS LaunchAgent 依赖它，Windows 也可把它当作 pythonw_path 的回退值。Absolute path to the Python executable; required by macOS LaunchAgent and can also act as a Windows fallback for pythonw_path.
_comment_fields.pythonw_path: Windows 专用后台运行路径，通常填写 pythonw.exe；macOS 不读取这个字段。Preferred hidden-background Python path on Windows, usually pythonw.exe; macOS does not read this field.
_comment_fields.model_cache_dir: 可选；supervisor 会把它导出成 MODEL_CACHE_DIR。Optional; exported by the supervisor as MODEL_CACHE_DIR.
_comment_fields.marker_cli: Marker 命令名或绝对路径，例如 marker_single 或 /absolute/path/to/marker_single。Marker command name or absolute path, such as marker_single or /absolute/path/to/marker_single.
_comment_fields.hf_home: Hugging Face 缓存目录。Hugging Face cache directory.
_comment_fields.marker_repo_root: 可选；只有需要从特定 Marker 源码目录启动时才填写。Optional; only needed if Marker must run from a specific source checkout.
_comment_fields.torch_device: 运行设备：NVIDIA 常用 cuda，Apple Silicon 常用 mps，无加速时用 cpu。Execution device: cuda for NVIDIA, mps for Apple Silicon, or cpu when no accelerator is available.
_comment_fields.output_format: Marker 输出格式，通常保持 markdown。Marker output format; usually keep this as markdown.
_comment_fields.force_ocr: 是否强制 OCR；扫描版 PDF 或识别效果不好时可设为 true。Whether to force OCR; set true for scanned PDFs or weak extraction results.
_comment_fields.disable_image_extraction: 是否禁用图片提取。Whether to disable image extraction.
_comment_fields.disable_multiprocessing: 是否禁用多进程；排查兼容性问题时可改为 true。Whether to disable multiprocessing; set true when debugging compatibility issues.
_comment_fields.paginate_output: 是否在 markdown 中加入分页标记。Whether to add page markers to markdown output.
_comment_fields.compute_sha256: 是否计算 PDF 的 SHA256 并写入 frontmatter，用于跨设备的变更检测；默认 true。Whether to compute the PDF's SHA256 and embed it in the frontmatter for cross-device change detection; defaults to true.
_comment_fields.log_level: 日志级别，例如 INFO、WARNING、ERROR。Log level, such as INFO, WARNING, or ERROR.
_comment_fields.run_mode: 运行模式：all-in-one（单机全功能，默认）/ runner（Win 端，只转换，不建镜像）/ controller（Mac 端，只巡检清理，不需要 marker）。Run mode: all-in-one (default) / runner (conversion only, no collection mirror) / controller (verification and cleanup only, marker not required).
_comment_fields.archive_before_delete: controller 模式：删除孤儿 Markdown 前是否先归档到 archive/，默认 true。Controller mode: whether to move orphan bundles to archive/ before deletion, default true.
_comment_fields.zotero_api_key: Zotero Web API key；也可用环境变量 ZOTERO_API_KEY。Zotero Web API key; may also be provided via ZOTERO_API_KEY.
_comment_fields.zotero_library_type: Zotero Web API library 类型：user 或 group。Zotero Web API library type: user or group.
_comment_fields.zotero_library_id: Zotero Web API library ID；user library 填 userID，group library 填 groupID。Zotero Web API library ID; use userID for user libraries and groupID for group libraries.
_comment_fields.rag_chunks_jsonl_paths: 可选；需要同步 metadata 的 RAG chunk JSONL 文件列表。Optional list of RAG chunk JSONL files whose metadata should be synced.
